requested.customGoal: Prioritize German and European software integrators, industrial automation firms, machine builders, and industrial customers with QC or process automation needs. Avoid direct AI platform competitors and generic SaaS.
requested.agentContext: Prefer Europe first, especially Germany. Relevant means correct ONE WARE category plus Europe fit. Keep personalization factual and template-led. Use partner angle only where product or OEM fit is clear.
